title: Kim Jong-un’s Daughter Drives a Tank as Talk Accelerates Around North Korea Succession
summary_full: Images of Kim Ju-ae at the helm of the military vehicle, with her father riding on top, added to speculation that she was being groomed to succeed him as North Korea’s leader.
summary_public: Images of Kim Ju-ae at the helm of the military vehicle, with her father riding on top, added to speculation that she was being groomed to succeed him as North Korea’s leader.
